name: event_confirmation
body_text: Hi {{1}}, your event on {{2}} at {{3}} is confirmed. Please review your contract and submit the next payment by {{4}}. Questions? Reply to this message or call +1 702-256-0193.

name: payment_reminder
body_text: Hi {{1}}, a balance of ${{2}} is due by {{3}} for your upcoming event. Pay via Zelle or PayPal @ChrisMurray-Momentos. Contact us if you need to discuss arrangements.

name: venue_walkthrough_reminder
body_text: Hi {{1}}, reminder that your venue walkthrough is scheduled for {{2}} at {{3}} — {{4}}. Please arrive on time. Reply to confirm.

name: event_day_checkin
body_text: Good morning {{1}}! Today is the big day — {{2}}. Our team arrives at {{3}} for setup. See you there. — Chris

name: new_inquiry_response
body_text: Hi {{1}}, thanks for contacting Momentos by Chris. I received your inquiry about a {{2}} event on {{3}}. I'll follow up within 24 hours to discuss details. — Chris Murray
